retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount_set is unconditional and always succeeds; failures come from allocations, not refcount issues.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is binder device creation (alloc, inode, dentry), not reference-count management. The refcount_set call is incidental initialization within broader logic.
